title: How to Set Up and Use SpaceBot (Better Than OpenClaw?)
summary: SpaceBot is an open-source framework designed for building AI agents integrated with community platforms like Discord, Telegram, Slack, Twitch, and WebChat. The video demonstrates Docker installation, model routing for token efficiency, skill integration via Apify, and use cases including content moderation and product brainstorming within Discord.
